EmailBuilder is used to build email messages for various notifications.

EmailMessage is a DTO class that contains email configuration and content.

EmailUtility - Class in com.rays.utill
EmailUtility provides email services for sending notifications.

encodeUrl(byte[]) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Encodes byte array to base64 URL format without padding.

Encodes a string to base64 URL format without padding.

extractLoginId(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Extracts the login ID (subject) from the JWT token.
extractRole(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Extracts the role from the JWT token.
extractUserId(String) - Method in class com.rays.config.JWTUtil
Extracts the user ID from the JWT token.
